overview.description: Test variable creation and usage (with conditions)
overview.name: Variable Test with conditions

var.comment: Check var with false condition won't be generated
var.name: notInitializedVar

var.comment: Create var with constant value as expression (to use later in expression var)
var.name: constExpressionVar

assert.comment: Check var was actually saved as constant

equal.comment: Check var was saved as constant

var.comment: Use constant var in expression var
var.name: expressionVar

assert.comment: Check expressionVar executed as expression and can be used in condition
